summary: Iteration 9: Full testing of Soul Report (Rapport de l'Âme), Dream Dictionary (Dictionnaire Onirique) features, and subscription page lifetime code visibility. All backend APIs passing (13/13 tests), frontend pages accessible and functional.

issues: Period format shows 'Semana del' (Spanish) instead of 'Semaine du' (French) when using French interface - appears to be mixing languages from AI generation

critical_code_review_comments: Soul Report API correctly generates reports with all required fields (summary, emotional_journey, dominant_themes, growth_areas, dream_insights, recommended_focus, affirmation, mood_distribution)
Dream Dictionary API supports CRUD operations: GET list, POST add (with AI-generated universal meaning), DELETE
Subscription page lifetime code input is now properly visible after expanding 'Accès à Vie' section
Navigation to new pages from home menu works correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new features accessible and functional

seed_data_creation: Created test symbols in dream dictionary: Lune, Eau, Test_fire, Test_étoile, Test_soleil. Generated multiple soul reports for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soul Report and Dream Dictionary features are fully implemented and working. Backend endpoints at /api/soul-report/latest, /api/soul-report/generate, /api/soul-reports, /api/dream-dictionary are all functional. Frontend pages at /soul-report and /dream-dictionary accessible from home menu. Subscription page lifetime code visibility fix confirmed working.

API /api/soul-report/latest.details: Returns the most recent soul report with all fields

API /api/soul-reports.details: Returns list of all soul reports

API /api/soul-report/generate.details: Generates new report with AI. Tested with FR, EN, ES languages. Takes ~8 seconds.

API /api/dream-dictionary GET.details: Returns list of dream symbols with personal and universal meanings

API /api/dream-dictionary POST.details: Adds new symbol with AI-generated universal meaning. Increments occurrences for existing symbols.

Frontend Soul Report page.details: Page loads with title 'Rapport de l'Âme'. Shows current report sections: Résumé, Voyage émotionnel, Thèmes dominants, Révélations oniriques, Axes de croissance, Focus recommandé, Affirmation. Has 'Générer un nouveau rapport' button and 'Rapports précédents' history.

Frontend Dream Dictionary page.details: Page loads with title 'Dictionnaire Onirique'. Shows search bar, symbol count (5 SYMBOLES DANS TON DICTIONNAIRE), list of symbols with emojis, meanings, occurrence counts. Has add button (+).

Navigation from home to new pages.details: Menu items 'Rapport de l'Âme' and 'Dictionnaire Onirique' visible in home menu. Clicking navigates correctly.

Subscription page lifetime code visibili.details: 'Accès à Vie' section with expandable card. When clicked, reveals input field with placeholder 'LATENCE-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX' and 'Activer' button. Input is visible and functional.
